channel.title: struct2depth on Daiji Blog
channel.description: Recent content in struct2depth on Daiji Blog

item.title: [翻訳] Depth Prediction Without the Sensors: Leveraging Structure for Unsupervised Learning from Monocular Videos
item.description: “Depth Prediction Without the Sensors: Leveraging Structure for Unsupervised Learning from Monocular Videos” の翻訳AKI_4/AKI_4解説を行います。まだ訳しきれてないですけど，もう書くのめんどくさいので公開します。 概要AKI_4/AKI_4はじめに 背景AKI_4/AKI
